title: Section 20
content: 1[20. Power of Central Government to give directions.-- The Central Government may, from time to time, give such directions to the Central Board as it may think fit for the efficient administration of this Act and when any such direction is given, the Central Board shall comply with such direction.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 33 of 1988, s. 25, for section 19A (w.e.f. 1-7-1997).
